response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Song 1 matched the provided lyrics. Song 2 did not match the provided lyrics in the reference JSON (the reference JSON had lyrics for a different PUNPEE song, not 'Time Machine ni Notte').
2. JSON Usage: Discarded the reference JSON for Song 2 and performed 100% manual transcription based on the actual audio and the on-screen burnt-in lyrics.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed subtitles precisely to vocal bursts. Included a visual title card block for 'Time Machine ni Notte' during the song's intro.

subtitles.original: 花びら舞い 散る 記憶舞い戻る
subtitles.english: Cherry blossom petals dance and scatter, memories return.

subtitles.original: 花びら舞い 散る
subtitles.english: Cherry blossom petals dance and scatter...

subtitles.original: タイムマシーンにのって
subtitles.english: [Song: Riding on a Time Machine]

subtitles.original: 人はこれって時にどうしても 「時間を戻せたら」とかいうね
subtitles.english: When times get tough, people always say, "If only I could turn back time."

subtitles.original: でも誰も直せないよ 治せないんだな
subtitles.english: But no one can change it, they just can't fix it.

subtitles.original: 昔からそうだし まぁしょうがないね
subtitles.english: It's always been that way, so I guess it can't be helped.

subtitles.original: きっと先は深くって不安定
subtitles.english: The road ahead is surely deep and unstable,

subtitles.original: でも お行儀よくちゃ つまんないね
subtitles.english: but being too well-behaved is just boring.

subtitles.original: タイムマシーンに乗り込んで
subtitles.english: If I could jump into a time machine

subtitles.original: トラベラーになれたら
subtitles.english: and become a time traveler...

subtitles.original: 箱の中の猫を思っても
subtitles.english: Even if I think about the cat in the box,

subtitles.original: 後悔だけが胸を焦がして
subtitles.english: only regret burns in my chest,

subtitles.original: いつもあの猜疑心が遮るんだわ
subtitles.english: and that skepticism always gets in the way.

subtitles.original: 昔からそうだし まぁしょうがないね
subtitles.english: It's always been that way, so I guess it can't be helped.

subtitles.original: きっと先は深くって不安定
subtitles.english: The road ahead is surely deep and unstable,

subtitles.original: でも お行儀よくちゃ つまんないね
subtitles.english: but being too well-behaved is just boring.

subtitles.original: タイムマシーンに乗り込んで
subtitles.english: If I could jump into a time machine

subtitles.original: トラベラーになれたら
subtitles.english: and become a time traveler...

subtitles.original: どこをどうやってもね
subtitles.english: No matter where I go or what I do,

subtitles.original: 時間ってのは戻せない
subtitles.english: time is something we can't turn back.

subtitles.original: レンズ越し未来にめがけて
subtitles.english: Aimed at the future through the lens,

subtitles.original: ピースサイン伝えてる 今のとこいい調子
subtitles.english: sending a peace sign. Doing good so far.

subtitles.original: 青春の1ページも
subtitles.english: Even a single page of my youth...

subtitles.original: たったの1ページで
subtitles.english: ...is just a single page.
